class.name: BTMultigoal
class.brief_description: Adds a multigoal (array of goals) to the todo list and runs the planner.
class.description: Uses [member goals] or blackboard variable [member goals_var] as the multigoal. Sets the todo list to that multigoal, runs [method PlannerPlan.find_plan], and on success writes the plan to the blackboard. Does not modify state directly; execution is via [BTExecutePlan]. Aligns with [PlannerMultigoal].

members.member: Array of unigoals (each unigoal: predicate, subject, value).
Blackboard variable for the multigoal array; overrides [member goals] if set.
Blackboard variable for the todo list.
